Craft Brewery & Taproom

Small-Batch Beer,
Brewed Unrefined.

Sweet stouts, kettle sours, and barrel-aged oddities made with real ingredients and zero shortcuts — poured fresh in downtown Dunedin.

What's Pouring

Live Tap List
Pouring a fresh list…

Our Story

Some Chase Consistency.
We Chase the Good Stuff.

We treat brewing like cooking with a very long wait — weeks of it — until you finally taste what you set out to make. Every batch starts with the best ingredients we can get our hands on.

No extracts, no shortcuts — real fruit, real chocolate, real everything. Seasons nudge each batch somewhere slightly new, and we think that's exactly the point.

18
On Tap Now
100%
Natural Ingredients
Small
Batch by Design
Local
Dunedin, Florida
🍺
The Taproom
Pull up a stool for rotating small-batch pours you won't find anywhere else.
🛢️
Barrel-Aged
Bourbon, rye, and whiskey-barrel stouts aged slow for big, layered flavor.
🎸
Taps & Takeovers
Rotating guest taps and events with friends from the Florida beer scene.
